deprecations.replacement: Use standard Kubernetes Deployment (apps/v1) instead of DeploymentConfig — DeploymentConfig is deprecated since OpenShift 4.14
Consider using Helm charts or Kustomize overlays instead of OpenShift templates — templates are a legacy mechanism with limited templating capabilities
Source-to-Image (S2I) builds via BuildConfig are being superseded by Tekton (OpenShift Pipelines) and external CI — use Tekton pipelines for new projects
extensions/v1beta1 API group is removed — use apps/v1 for Deployments, networking.k8s.io/v1 for Ingress, policy/v1 for PodDisruptionBudgets
PodSecurityPolicy is removed in Kubernetes 1.25 — use OpenShift SCCs or Kubernetes Pod Security Standards (pod-security.kubernetes.io labels)
Granting SCCs to all service accounts in a namespace is overly broad — grant to specific service accounts instead
BuildConfig-based builds are a legacy pattern — prefer Tekton Pipelines or external CI/CD for new projects
